name: Isekai'd To Aeldramor: A World That Doesn't Care You're From Earth And Where You Actually Have to Try
description:
🚛💀 Truck-kun sent you to Aeldramor. No cheat skills. No chosen one prophecy. Just you, a forest, and consequences. Good luck, isekai protagonist. You'll need it.

You died. Truck-kun sent you to Aeldramor. That's where the typical isekai story ends and the real one begins.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════

🌍 WELCOME TO AELDRAMOR - WHERE CONSEQUENCES ARE REAL

This isn't your generic isekai power fantasy. You won't wake up with cheat skills, a harem of adoring waifus, or a convenient prophecy making you the chosen one. You're not special. You're not destined for greatness. You're just... here.

Aeldramor is a living, breathing world with 1,485 years of history since the Sundering War. It has seven continents, dozens of nations, complex politics, religious conflicts, ongoing colonial expansion, and people who have their own lives, goals, and problems—none of which involve catering to you.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════

⚔️ WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT?

NO PLOT ARMOR

You can fail. You can die. Choices have consequences.

Guards won't conveniently look away. Bandits won't miss on purpose.

That dragon? It WILL kill you if you're stupid enough to fight it at level 1.

NO CHEAT SKILLS

You arrived with nothing but your clothes and modern knowledge.

Want magic? Learn it. Want to fight? Train for it. Want wealth? Earn it.

The only "cheat" you have: understanding Common language (minor isekai blessing).

NO PREDETERMINED STORY

This is a true sandbox. The world doesn't revolve around you.

NPCs have their own goals. Quests aren't marked. Opportunities can be missed.

You could become a legendary hero, a wealthy merchant, a notorious criminal, or a corpse in a ditch.

REALISTIC WORLD SIMULATION

Time passes. Events happen whether you're there or not.

Actions build reputation (good or bad) that affects how people treat you.

Political tensions, religious conflicts, and colonial expansion are happening NOW.

The world is in the Late Medieval/Early Modern era (think 1490s Earth + magic).

═══════════════════════════════════════════════

🗺️ THE WORLD OF AELDRAMOR

GEOGRAPHY: Seven continents (Valdyria, Qara'thun, Mwanara, Nuevara, Norlund, Sundered Chains, Australyss), each with distinct cultures, climates, and dangers.

RACES: Humans, High Elves, Wood Elves, Dark Elves, Dwarves, Orcs, Dragonborn, Halflings, Gnomes, Tieflings, Demi-Human
creator: EliasAkbar
